---

<p class="key-answer" data-question="Insulin Degludec 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Insulin Degludec</strong> 目前有 <strong>5 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 10 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Insulin Degludec 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Xultophy is indicated for the treatment of adults with type-2 diabetes mellitus to improve glycaemic control in combination with oral glucose-lowering medicinal products when these alone or combined...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（10 個）：<ul>
<li>type 1 diabetes mellitus（99.4%）</li>
<li>autoimmune oophoritis（99.2%）</li>
<li>opsismodysplasia（99.1%）</li>
<li>diabetes mellitus (disease)（99.1%）</li>
<li>thiamine-responsive dysfunction syndrome（99.1%）</li>
<li>focal stiff limb syndrome（99.1%）</li>
<li>classic stiff person syndrome（99.1%）</li>
<li>drug-induced localized lipodystrophy（98.7%）</li>
<li>pancreatic agenesis（98.6%）</li>
<li>centrifugal lipodystrophy（98.6%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="{{ '/drugs/insulin-degludec/' | relative_url }}">查看完整藥物報告 →</a></p>
</div>
